hooks.command: BRANCH=$(git symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo main); OUTPUT=$(git pull --ff-only origin $BRANCH 2>&1); EXIT=$?; if [ $EXIT -ne 0 ]; then echo "{\"decision\":\"block\",\"reason\":\"git pull failed — resolve manually before working\",\"systemMessage\":\"git pull --ff-only failed. Fix conflicts or stash changes before starting.\"}"; elif echo "$OUTPUT" | grep -q "Already up to date"; then echo "{\"systemMessage\":\"Repo already up to date.\"}"; else echo "{\"systemMessage\":\"Pulled latest changes from origin/$BRANCH.\"}"; fi
